FROM: sandeep.rao@delta-infra.com
TO: bids@acmecorp.com
DATE: Monday, May 19, 2026 10:32 AM
SUBJECT: Welding Robots – Looking for a Good Vendor, Thought of You Guys

Hi team,

Hope you're all doing well over there! It's been a while since we last connected — I think the last time we spoke was at the Mumbai Manufacturing Expo back in February. Anyway, I wanted to reach out because we've got a fairly significant procurement coming up and I'd like to see if ACME can help us out.

We are setting up a new assembly line at our Pune plant and need 15 units of 6-axis industrial welding robots. We've been evaluating KUKA and ABB mostly, but we're open to equivalent brands if you have something competitive. Our total budget for the lot is ₹2.2 crore — that includes delivery and installation support if possible. AMC pricing would also be appreciated separately.

Deadline for delivery is August 15, 2026 — our line goes live September 1st and we need buffer time for commissioning. Please send your best bid by June 10, 2026 with warranty terms included.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Warm regards,
Sandeep Rao
Procurement Head | Delta Infrastructure Pvt. Ltd.

SUBJECT: RFQ – EV Battery Packs for Q3 Production Run

Dear Vendor,

Good afternoon. We are reaching out to a select group of pre-qualified suppliers for a critical Q3 procurement. Greenfield Auto is scaling EV production at our Leipzig plant and we need reliable battery supply.

Requirement:
- 2,000 units of 62 kWh LFP battery packs
- 800 units of 88 kWh LFP battery packs
Total budget: €18 million for the combined lot.

Delivery must be staggered — first 1,200 units by September 1, 2026 and the balance by October 20, 2026. All units must carry UN38.3 certification. We will also require full traceability documentation and cell-level test reports.

If you are interested and able to meet these volumes and timelines, please submit a formal bid by June 20, 2026. Late bids will not be considered.

Best regards,
Marco Klein
Supply Chain Director | Greenfield Auto GmbH

SUBJECT: Bulk Laptop Procurement – Bid Invitation (Urgent)

Hello,

I hope this finds you well. We are expanding our engineering team significantly this quarter and need to move fast on a laptop procurement. I'm reaching out to a few vendors we've worked with before — you're on the list because your last delivery in 2024 was smooth and on time, which we really appreciated.

What we need: 120 laptops, minimum 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD, Intel i7 13th gen or equivalent, 15.6 inch display. Preferred brands are Dell Latitude, Lenovo ThinkPad, or HP EliteBook — no consumer-grade machines please. Our ceiling budget is $1,20,000 for the full batch.

All units need to reach our Bangalore office by July 5, 2026. Please share your best unit price, lead time, and warranty terms. Also let me know if you can handle onsite setup for 30 of the units — we'd pay separately for that.

Bids close June 12, 2026. Feel free to call me if you have questions.

Thanks,
Preethi Nair

SUBJECT: Electric Delivery Vans – Fleet Expansion Bid

Good morning,

UrbanMove Logistics is expanding our last-mile delivery fleet in FY2026-27 and we are in the market for 75 electric delivery vans. This is part of our green fleet transition — we're moving away from CNG entirely by March 2027.

Spec requirement: minimum 150km real-world range, payload capacity of at least 800kg, sliding side door, and telematics-ready. We are open to Tata Ace EV, Mahindra Treo Zor Plus, or equivalent.

Total budget: ₹18 crore for the full fleet. Deliveries must be phased — 25 vans by September 30, 2026, 25 by November 30, and the final 25 by January 31, 2027. All vehicles to be delivered to our Navi Mumbai depot with standard RTO registration support.

Vendors who can also provide a service contract (AMC for 3 years) will be preferred. Please submit bids by June 28, 2026.

Best,
Priya Subramaniam
Fleet Procurement Manager | UrbanMove Logistics
priya.s@urbanmove-logistics.com | +91-22-6891-4430

SUBJECT: Smart Classroom Equipment – Government Tender – 500 Schools

Dear Sir/Madam,

This is a formal bid invitation on behalf of the State Department of School Education for the supply and installation of smart classroom infrastructure across 500 government schools in the state.

Scope of supply per school:
- 1 interactive flat panel (75 inch, 4K, Android-based)
- 1 document camera
- 1 ceiling-mounted speaker system
- Structured cabling and power backup (1kVA UPS)
- Installation, teacher training (1 day per school), and 3-year onsite warranty

Total project value: ₹42 crore (approx ₹8.4 lakh per school all-inclusive). Deployment timeline: Phase 1 (200 schools) by October 31, 2026; Phase 2 (300 schools) by February 28, 2027.

This is a government tender. Interested vendors must submit EMD of ₹42 lakhs along with the technical and financial bid. Full tender document available on the state e-procurement portal. Last date for bid submission: June 30, 2026.

For clarifications contact:
R. Venkatesh, Procurement Officer
State Dept. of School Education

FROM: deepak.joshi@fastpack-mfg.com
TO: sales@acmecorp.com
DATE: Friday, May 23, 2026 9:05 AM
SUBJECT: Aluminium Sheets and Coils – Monthly Supply Contract

Hi,

Good morning. We've been sourcing aluminium from our current vendor for three years but have had too many delays this year — so we're exploring alternatives. A colleague recommended you, so I thought I'd reach out.

We need a 12-month monthly supply contract for:
- Aluminium sheets: 3mm and 5mm thickness, IS 737 grade, approx 40 MT per month
- Aluminium coils: 1.5mm, 2mm thickness, IS 737 grade, approx 25 MT per month

Target price: ₹190 per kg for sheets and ₹195 per kg for coils. Monthly delivery to our Bhiwandi plant, Maharashtra. First delivery needed by July 1, 2026 and monthly on the 1st of each month thereafter.

Contract period is 12 months with an option to extend for another 12 months at mutually agreed pricing. We'll need a material test report with every delivery and the right to reject and return any lot that fails our incoming inspection.

Please submit your bid with itemised pricing, GST breakup, payment terms, and your quality control process summary by June 22, 2026. If you'd like to visit the plant before bidding, you're welcome — just drop me a message and we'll fix a time.

Thanks,
Deepak Joshi
Sourcing Manager | FastPack Manufacturing Pvt. Ltd.
